next_steps: Implement strict airborne and contact isolation precautions immediately
Perform PCR testing for Varicella-Zoster Virus (VZV), Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV), and Mpox from vesicle fluid
Obtain RPR and confirmatory treponemal antibody testing for syphilis
Perform HIV screening and obtain CD4 count if positive
Conduct a full skin examination for burrows and scrape for microscopic identification of Sarcoptes scabiei
Review medication history for new initiations or dosage changes related to the psychiatric regimen
Assess for systemic manifestations, including lymphadenopathy and organomegaly
